arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham vs Wolves Premier League preview, including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Andros Townsend hits back over claims Son Heung-min 'is finished in Premier League'
arts.sum: Former Tottenham winger Andros Townsend believes Spurs forward Son Heung-min still has so much to give in the Premier League despite the South Korean's worrying form this season

arts.ttl: 'They will find a way to win': Chris Sutton predicts scoreline of today's Tottenham v Wolves clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will be desperate to get back to winning ways when they host Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League on Sunday. Spurs have lost...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves preview: Spurs have centre-back injury crisis
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has revealed Tottenham are looking into why so many players have suffered injury setbacks this season. Guys who are coming back from injury rather than us losing players as such," Postecoglou said.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's 'make or break' Tottenham game revealed as Daniel Levy makes sack decision
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou reportedly retains the backing of the Tottenham Hotspur board, but the situation could change if they lose to Liverpool in the EFL Cup semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Tottenham told they must stick with Ange Postecoglou as Mauricio Pochettino sack call questioned
arts.sum: Amazon Prime pundit and ex-Spurs winger Andros Townsend remains a firm admirer of Ange Postecoglou despite his side suffering their ninth Premier League defeat of the season at Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day

arts.ttl: Alfie Dorrington drops early Tottenham team news hint for Wolves amid Ange Postecoglou crisis
arts.sum: Radu Dragusin, having started 13 of the last 14 games in all competitions, suffered an ankle injury in the recent defeat to Nottingham Forest which has made him a huge doubt for Sunday's clash. We'll wait until he gets in [for training] today [Friday] and assess him from there." If Dragusin is passed fit, him starting alongside Gray once again appears inevitable, but there is one other option despite the plaguing injury problems.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make sack decision on Ange Postecoglou amid woeful Premier League run
arts.sum: Tottenham have lost four of their last five Premier League games to slip to 12th place in the table and leave manager Ange Postecoglou under pressure going into the New Year

arts.ttl: National League side Tamworth are slammed by fans after charging HUGE ticket prices for their fairytale FA Cup tie at home to Tottenham
arts.sum: The National League side will host Ange Postecoglou's team at The Lamb Ground on January 12 in one of the most intriguing ties of the round.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou given Liverpool lifeline as Tottenham set manager stance
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou retains the support of the club, despite the team’s faltering form, although one crucial game could be on the horizon, according to latest reports. Spurs have won just one of their last six Premier League games since the start of December, and fell to a 1-0 defeat against Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day. It was their second loss in a row, following the 6-3 home defeat against Liverpool just a few days earlier.
